view.params:
SELECT bzhssheet.SID,bzhssheet.cz
FROM bzhssheet
WHERE   (bzhssheet.bknr="纸箱包装")
   AND  (bzhssheet.zl="外箱材质")
ORDER BY bzhssheet.SID ASC

view.params:
SELECT ywrybiao.SID,ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.SID,ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC

SELECT mdka.mdka,mdka.SID
FROM mdka
ORDER BY mdka.SID ASC

SELECT wfgs.SID,wfgs.wfgs
FROM wfgs
ORDER BY wfgs.SID ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.bm like "%外销%")
 
ORDER BY ywrybiao.yhm ASC
